response.original_title: Trevor Noah: Joy in the Trenches
response.overview: In a world that’s constantly unexpected, comic genius and reluctant philosopher Trevor Noah goes beyond punchlines to uncover life’s hidden humor where most people only see chaos. After a public relations disaster spirals into a full‑blown social media meltdown, Noah finds himself “embedded” in the trenches of everyday life — from awkward family dinners to disastrous first dates, from awkward corporate retreats to impossible parking lots — turning ordinary misfortune into extraordinary comedy. A surreal blend of stand‑up sets, candid conversations, and mockumentary‑style escapades, Joy in the Trenches follows Noah’s quest to prove that you don’t have to win to laugh — you just have to show up. Along the way, he confronts his own insecurities, navigates absurd pop‑culture battles, and discovers that the thing that terrifies you most can also be the thing that cracks you up the hardest.
response.tagline: Find the funny in the fallout.
response.title: Trevor Noah: Joy in the Trenches
